name: g3-toolkit
description: A composable, paradigm-neutral graph visualization toolkit for RDF, LPG, and Holonic architectures.

scripts.gates: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run verify && pnpm run test && pnpm run gates:spec
scripts.gates:spec: python3 scripts/lint_specs.py specs/ && python3 scripts/sync_spec_status.py && python3 scripts/check_roadmap_coverage.py
scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.lint: eslint src/ packages/core/src/ packages/react/src/ packages/charts/src/ tests/ && prettier --check src/ packages/core/src/ packages/react/src/ packages/charts/src/ tests/
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix src/ tests/ && prettier --write src/ tests/
scripts.build:packages: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -b packages/core packages/react packages/charts --force && pnpm --filter "./packages/*" --workspace-concurrency=1 run build && node scripts/fix-dts-extensions.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run verify:exports && pnpm run verify:treeshake && pnpm run verify:smoke && pnpm run verify:types && pnpm run verify:snippets && pnpm run docs:check && pnpm run verify:bundle
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run docs:api && pnpm run docs:storybook && pnpm run docs:demo && pnpm run visual-acceptance && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('docs-out/acceptance',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('scripts/visual-acceptance/dist/visual-acceptance.html','docs-out/acceptance/index.html');fs.copyFileSync('docs/landing.html','docs-out/index.html')"
scripts.visual-acceptance: vite build --config vite.va.config.ts && vite build --config vite.va-client.config.ts && node scripts/visual-acceptance/.build/emit.mjs
